zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume d'Olhain於1140年出生在法國時，他的父親Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval23歲，母親Blanche de Bours16歲。他和Ursule de Colembert至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1197年享年57歲。

zh-hans.Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧利海
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume d'Olhain于1140年出生在法国时，他的父亲Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval23岁，母亲Blanche de Bours16岁。他和Ursule de Colembert至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1197年享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume d'Olhain was born in 1140, in France, his father, Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval, was 23 and his mother, Blanche de Bours, was 16. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Ursule de Colembert. He died in 1197, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume d'Olhain est né en 1140, à France, son père, Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Bours, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Ursule de Colembert. Il est décédé en 1197, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume d'Olhain 1140 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval 23 und seine Mutter Blanche de Bours 16. Er hatte mit Ursule de Colembert mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1197 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume d'Olhain è nato il nel 1140 nel Francia, il suo padre, Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de Bours, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Ursule de Colembert. Morì nel 1197, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Ha: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレスニコウルト-レ-ドルメン

ja.Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスオルヘイン
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Olhainが1140年にフランスで生まれた時，父Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingovalは23歳，母Blanche de Boursは16歳であった。彼はUrsule de Colembertとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1197年に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Olhain(이)가 1140년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Bours(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Ursule de Colembert(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1197년 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume d'Olhain nasceu em 1140, em França, seu pai, Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Bours, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Ursule de Colembert. Ele faleceu em 1197, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume d'Olhain родился в 1140 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Bours, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Ursule de Colembert. Он умер в 1197 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume d'Olhain nació en 1140, en Francia, su papá, Wallérand d'Olhain-Mingoval, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Blanche de Bours, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Ursule de Colembert. Murió en 1197, a la edad de 57 años.
